name: stage2-rvv-low-precision-contraction-primitive-surface-gate1
title: Stage2 RVV low-precision contraction primitive surface campaign
description: Macro campaign for RVV low-precision contraction primitives; Gates 1-3 are complete and Gate 4 is active for Gearbox/resource-aware selected-body realization plus measured same-target comparison.
creator: codex
notes: Gates 1-3 are complete. Gate 4 primitive source/load/extension, widening-product role/policy facts, selected-dispatch no-win denial, packed-i4 low-shifted-product-rescale schedule/resource repair, complete source-backed same-target evidence-root policy ingestion, and the packed-i4 resource-cost/admission blocker now flow through Gearbox resource admission, selected-body realization/admission handoff, route metadata, target artifact mirrors, generated-bundle checks, same-target measurement records, production-pressure policy inputs, and selected-dispatch policy evaluation. The current packed-i4 resource-cost contract is rvv-low-precision-packed-i4-resource-cost-contract.v1 with model low-shifted-product-rescale-loop-12-peak-live-6of32-two-region-vsetvl.v1, loop-body steps 12, blocker packed-i4-low-shifted-product-rescale-loop-12-budget-6of32-no-win, and admission decision deny-performance-preferred-with-resource-cost-no-win-blocker. Fresh ssh rvv timing after the production schedule repair still reports regression/no-win: dequant 0.688202..0.705133 and dequant-clamp 0.677994..0.704931. Route support and correctness execution remain allowed through correctness-fallback; performance-preferred remains denied unless a later provider-owned repair produces fresh measured-win evidence. Macro remains active for the next Gate 4 schedule/resource bottleneck or explicit blocker.
